mnemonics.title: RISC vs CISC
mnemonics.content: RISC: Reduced Instruction Set Computing, CISC: Complex Instruction Set Computing

acronyms.usage: RISC architecture is designed to improve execution speed
CISC architecture is designed to improve code density

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a pipeline with stages, each stage processing a part of the instruction
Imagine a set of low-level instructions that implement complex instructions

analogies.analogy: RISC is like a sports car, fast and efficient, while CISC is like a truck, powerful and feature-rich
